job_description:
• Authors Blogs Currently pursuing a bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field, with a GPA of 3.
• Enrolled in a full-time degree program and returning to university after the completion of the internship.
• Hands-on experience with debugging software or hardware issues is preferred.
• Strong desire to develop coding skills and an aptitude for problem-solving.
• Strong Windows system skills and exposure to Linux operating systems are desirable.
• Previous experience with coding is beneficial but not required.
